evals.prompt: Temos logs de um workflow n8n que automatizou cadastro de leads. 90 dias de dados. Calcula ROI comparando com processo manual anterior (5 min/lead manual, 30 seg/lead automatizado, custo R$50/hora).
evals.expected_output: ROI calculation with time saved, cost savings, ROI percentage, payback period, and visualization. Should update memory/history.md.

evals.prompt: Cria dashboard de KPIs para projeto de IA: taxa de adoção (target 80%), tempo médio de resposta (target <3s), satisfação usuário (target 4.5/5). Dados em /data/ai-project-kpis.csv. Dashboard interativo em HTML.
evals.expected_output: Interactive HTML dashboard with Plotly showing current vs target for each KPI, with color-coding and trends. Should update memory/datasets.md.

evals.prompt: Analisa dados de mentoria do Education Agent. Compara turma A (hands-on) vs turma B (só teoria). 40 participantes total. Dados: quiz scores, feedback. Responde: diferença é significativa?
evals.expected_output: Statistical comparison with descriptive stats, t-test results, visualization, and clear business-language interpretation of significance. Should update memory/insights.md.
